message:
fix(list): --json flag ignored when --tree defaults to true (bd-03r)

The --tree flag defaults to true, making prettyFormat always active.
Since the prettyFormat branch returned before reaching the jsonOutput
check, --json was silently ignored. Fix: check jsonOutput first so
JSON output takes priority over tree display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
